parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projetos WHERE status != 'CONCLUÍDO') as projetos_ativos, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projetos WHERE status = 'CONCLUÍDO') as projetos_concluidos, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tarefas WHERE status != 'CONCLUÍDO') as tarefas_abertas, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tarefas WHERE status = 'CONCLUÍDO') as tarefas_concluidas, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('responsavel', responsavel, 'total', total_tarefas, 'concluidas', concluidas)) FROM (SELECT responsavel, COUNT(*) as total_tarefas, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CONCLUÍDO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as concluidas FROM tarefas GROUP BY responsavel) as prod) as produtividade, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('status', status, 'total', total)) FROM (SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM tarefas GROUP BY status) as st) as tarefas_por_status;
